profile.label: Profile
profile.summary: Full stack developer with 4 years' experience in Mobile/Web App Development, skilled in TypeScript, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and PostgreSQL. Currently pursuing MSc. in Natural Language Processing, eager to contribute to scalable backend services and responsive frontends in a collaborative agile environment.

entries.title: Software Developer
bullets: Designed and developed enterprise-level web and cross-platform mobile applications using React.js, Next.js, Redux, Typescript, and Node.js, delivering high-performance solutions.
Built and maintained CI/CD pipelines using Fastlane and GitHub Actions, reducing manual deployment time by 2-3 hours per release.
Optimized React Native app bundle size by ~25%, improving startup time and reducing memory consumption.
Implemented RESTful APIs with Express.js and PostgreSQL, including secure user authentication and role-based authorization using JWT and OAuth2 for 5K+ users.
Collaborated in agile teams, mentoring junior developers through code reviews and pair programming, enhancing code quality and accelerating feature delivery.

entries.title: Software Developer
bullets: Developed and maintained backend RESTful APIs and frontend components of a payment gateway system serving over 1 million users using React.js, Next.js, Node.js, and Typescript.
Optimized API performance with Redis caching and query optimization, reducing response times and server load.
Implemented frontend performance improvements with memoization, lazy loading, and react-query caching to minimize unnecessary API calls.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an agile environment to deliver scalable, secure payment features.

entries.title: MSc. in Natural Language Processing
bullets: Building foundational knowledge in computational linguistics, machine learning, transformers, and large language models.
Developing practical skills in software engineering and AI, with projects using Python, Hugging Face Transformers, spaCy, and NLTK.
Researching code-generation principles in NLP, bridging AI and software development.

entries.title: Bachelors Degree in Computer Engineering
bullets: Studied core computer science subjects including Linux, AI, calculus, linear algebra, statistics, and probability.
Developed a blockchain-based medicine supply chain system using a private blockchain network as a final year project, demonstrating distributed systems and applied cryptography.
